subcodes.first_line: O God, Thou Who hast manifested with the light of Beauty from the horizon of Glory, and by Whom earth and heaven are illumined at every dawn [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اللهم یا من تجلی بنور الجمال من افق الجلال و اشرقت به الارض و السما فی کل غدو
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for protection, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @praise and encouragement, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers
